subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath been illumined by the lights of the Sun of Meeting and hath quaffed from the ocean of reunion when the Most Great Luminary was manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن تنور بانوار شمس اللقاء و شرب من بحر الوصال اذ کان النیر الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
